{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230314425EAC5301F1D32EB703DA"}"},"total":41},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7588084954039829310","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"九叔为主角的书呀！真的不多见，剧情设计合理，在原有的剧情上做了小改动，便改变了故事的走向，人物的刻画也很丰满，秋生的调皮和正义，九叔的正直与腹黑，四目的老顽童性格，都很符合电影里的形象。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766739224,"group_id":"7577200827392085017","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/JzmiEqc4/3hiTd0p2MR7w=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787248&x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"110843871099","user_name":"爱吃新疆米粉的霍森"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110843871099","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":6,"fan_ranklist_title":"真爱粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7577200827392085017","book_info":{"abstract":"［系统］［诸天万界］［道法］［九叔］
红绳糯米今犹在，不见当年林道人，诸天万界的九叔启蒙过无数的穿越者，却一直都被当做跳板，很少有人记得他的恩情，带他起飞。当“最强道祖系统”降临到九叔身上，一个不怎么靠谱的系统，和一个正直之中又带有一点腹黑的九叔，会碰撞出怎么样的火花呢！行走天下，斩妖除魔，穿梭于诸天万界之中，一句贫道林九，请诸位赴死，成了各界妖魔鬼怪的噩梦……
本书中会出现很多道法口诀，各种民间鬼故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/164420cfa69571954f344588875d5d59","author":"黑不溜秋的肉包子","author_id":"","book_id":"7577200827392085017","book_name":"九叔最强道祖系统","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":383,"name":"九叔","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=383&name=九叔&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7578113595485979161","read_count":"13747","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"499822"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"243","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,系统,诸天万界,灵异,九叔","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cc91f28c23bc3d85bcaa0c9ef4523182~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779390882&x-signature=4zNmKJRH%2BH3FxqKqE0Z3gG6UnJU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2418536705956551","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"167"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230314425EAC5301F1D32EB703DA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读22小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"li
